title: HOOK 1 — Ginger swipes a bagel
prompt: Wide low-angle shot in @backyard-kitchen, locked camera, soft mid-morning sunlight on the grass. @Ginger trots into frame from screen-right with a small golden bagel held proudly in her teeth, tail wagging high, ears perked. She slows near a flowerbed of pink and purple petunias center-frame, sniffs the soil, then sets the bagel down carefully on the dirt. Ginger: "Mmf-mmf!" Quick playful music sting, no humans visible.
